$comment: Consensus BINARY gate verdict for Phase 1.5 (TODO-02) API contract.

issues_found_and_fixed: openapi.yaml failed to parse: unquoted descriptions containing 'event: token' / 'event: final' were read by the YAML scanner as nested mappings (ScannerError line 814). -> Quoted both SSE description strings.
Confirmed (pre-fix sweep) that all error responses route through shared problem+json response components and the error_catalog codes exactly match the spec's Problem.code values.

verification: YAML parses as OpenAPI 3.1.0; 0 broken $refs across 116 reference uses.
10 unique operationIds over 8 paths; every operation has request body (where applicable) + >=1 2xx + >=1 4xx + 500 (operations probes /health,/ready exempt from 4xx by design).
GET /v1/documents paginates via DocumentListResponse + Pagination envelope.
Versioning (URL-path v1, semver doc) + 180-day deprecation/Sunset policy documented in info.description.
All 10 shared error responses use application/problem+json (RFC-7807).
All 29 PRD FRs accounted: 23 mapped to >=1 operationId, 6 marked non-API with reason -> 100% coverage.
DPDP: 14 x-pii field annotations + erasure (deleteDocument) + access (exportDocumentData); CERT-In: 6 x-audit-log write ops; 3 x-rate-limit annotations.
/v1/route is routing-only (no generation path); /v1/answer streams SSE; section_id is the universal key across schemas.

needs_user_decision.item: Enterprise-tier dedicated-instance topology at GA (inherited from HLD OAQ-5)
needs_user_decision.impact: Commercial/GA infrastructure choice; NOT an MVP or contract blocker.
needs_user_decision.recommended_default: Ship MVP with shared logical isolation (tenant_id payload filter + region-pinned collections via residency_region); offer dedicated per-tenant instances as a paid Enterprise add-on at GA.
